title: Section 1
content: (1) This 1[Act] may be called the International Monetary Fund and Bank 1[Act], 1945. (2) It extends to 2[the whole of India 3* * *]. (3) It shall come into force at once.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 25 of 1959, s. 2, for "Ordinance". 2. Subs. by the A.O. 1950, for "all the Provinces of India". 3. The words "except Part B States" omitted by Act 3 of 1951, s. 3 and the Sch.
